name: Montrose Environmental Group, Inc.
summary: PART I Item 1. Bu siness. Since our inception in 2012, our mission has been to help clients and communities meet their environmental goals and needs. We service complex and often non-discretionary environmental needs of our diverse clients across our three business segments: Assessment, Permitting and Response; Measurement and Analysis; and Remediation and Reuse.
